purpose: This repository showcases various design patterns implemented in Java for educational purposes.
Provides localized versions of design patterns documentation in Chinese.

key_files.name: zh/README.md
key_files.role: Main overview of the localization content.

key_files.name: zh/visitor/README.md
key_files.role: Documentation for the Visitor pattern.

key_files.name: zh/version-number/README.md
key_files.role: Documentation for the Version Number pattern.

key_files.name: zh/value-object/README.md
key_files.role: Documentation for the Value Object pattern.

key_files.name: zh/update-method/README.md
key_files.role: Documentation for the Update Method pattern.

purpose: Demonstrates the Hexagonal Architecture pattern in Java, emphasizing decoupling of business logic from external interfaces for maintainability and testability.

key_files.name: App.java
key_files.role: Entry point of the application.

key_files.name: LotteryAdministration.java
key_files.role: Manages lottery rounds.

key_files.name: LotteryService.java
key_files.role: Handles lottery ticket operations.

key_files.name: AppTest.java
key_files.role: Unit tests for the App class.

key_files.name: LotteryTestUtils.java
key_files.role: Utilities for creating lottery tickets in tests.

key_files.name: MongoEventLogTest.java
key_files.role: Tests for MongoDB event logging.

concerns: No tests are present for LotteryAdministration and LotteryService classes.
MongoEventLogTest is disabled, making those tests non-executable.
General comments in the code indicate potential areas for further implementation.
Some methods in LotteryAdministration and LotteryService have incomplete implementations.
The README lacks examples for integrating with the database.

purpose: Demonstrates the implementation of the Page Object design pattern in Java for automated UI testing.

key_files.name: README.md
key_files.role: Documentation that explains the Page Object pattern and its benefits.

key_files.name: pom.xml
key_files.role: Maven project configuration with dependencies for the Page Object module.

key_files.name: test-automation/pom.xml
key_files.role: Maven configuration for the test automation module with necessary dependencies.

key_files.name: test-automation/src/test/java/com/iluwatar/pageobject/AlbumListPageTest.java
key_files.role: JUnit test class for testing album selection and listing functionality.

key_files.name: test-automation/src/test/java/com/iluwatar/pageobject/AlbumPageTest.java
key_files.role: JUnit test class for testing album page operations.

concerns: Tests using WebClient may not have complete browser simulation.
Missing tests for edge cases and exception handling in the page objects.
Potential for dead code if page objects are not updated with UI changes.
No clear separation of test logic and verifications in some tests.
Need for additional tests to confirm functionality across different page states.

purpose: This repository provides an implementation of the Microservices API Gateway design pattern in Java, optimizing communication between client and microservices.

key_files.name: ApiGateway.java
key_files.role: Main entry point for routing requests to microservices.

key_files.name: ImageClientImpl.java
key_files.role: Client implementation for retrieving images from the Image microservice.

key_files.name: PriceClientImpl.java
key_files.role: Client implementation for retrieving prices from the Price microservice.

key_files.name: pom.xml
key_files.role: Project configuration file for Maven dependencies and modules.

concerns: Missing tests for ApiGateway and its methods.
No error handling in API client implementations.
Test cases in price-microservice may be insufficient for real use cases.
Potential high availability setups not addressed in the documentation.
No examples provided for using the API Gateway in real scenarios.

purpose: This folder contains implementations and documentation for various design patterns used in software development, including specifications for their application in Java.

key_files.name: specification/README.md
key_files.role: Documentation of the Specification design pattern

key_files.name: specification/pom.xml
key_files.role: Maven configuration for the Specification pattern module

key_files.name: commander/README.md
key_files.role: Documentation of the Commander design pattern

key_files.name: commander/pom.xml
key_files.role: Maven configuration for the Commander pattern module

key_files.name: microservices-distributed-tracing/README.md
key_files.role: Documentation of the Microservices Distributed Tracing design pattern

concerns: Some patterns lack comprehensive testing examples in the documentation.
Potential performance overhead from added complexity in design patterns like Commander and Distributed Tracing.
Documentation in folders may not include clear examples for each design pattern implementation.
Regular updates may be needed to keep dependencies aligned with latest standards.
